issues.sample: Vehicle has an issue where it intermittently throws errors, loses power, accelerates on its own, and is difficult to steer.  I purchased it with 12,800 miles in it and it has been having this issue since then and no one has been able to fix it.  It appears from maintenance record

THE ENGINE STOPPED ITSELF WHEN I WAS AT A COMPLETE STOP AT A TRAFFIC SIGNAL.  AFTER A FEW MINUTES I WAS ABLE TO START THE ENGINE AGAIN.  IT DID THIS THREE TIMES IN THE SPACE OF AN HOUR. ALWAYS AT A COMPLETE STOP.

narrative.headline: What 2019 Cadillac Ats owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (50% of reports).
